title: Dynamic Vanilla
description: It's like Vanilla Plus, but more vanilla and even more plus
body:
![A header for "Dynamic Vanilla" with the title and two lines encompassing it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/848487272f23ae050fc698e99d05e009f9e956d3.png)

**Dynamic Vanilla** is a Vanilla Plus modpack that attempts to redefine what Vanilla Plus actually means. It's a modpack with no set in stone style or specific catering towards a certain type of player - it's just trying to _be_, and nothing else.

Out of the **116** mods and datapacks (that aren't libraries or APIs) in **Dynamic Vanilla**, only **40** of them actually change the game in a notable way. It's primarily based off of YUNG's and Fuzs' wonderful mods that they've created, stuffing them together like a Frankenstein of a project.

**Dynamic Vanilla** wasn't made to challenge a player, or to provide a more enjoyable experience with friends, or even to mess around in a creative setting. **Dynamic Vanilla** is just a fun side project that I wanted to "work" on in my spare time.

I hope you enjoy. And if you don't, what's there to lose?

# RECOMMENDED GAMERULES FOR SURVIVAL
- Sleep percentage - 50
- Spawn phantoms - OFF
- In block interaction/mob/TNT explosions, some blocks won't drop their loot - OFF
- Random tick speed rate - 9
